title: THETA Control Room — Build Hook Delta

changedProjects.lastKnownStatus: Build hook reported latest project state.
changedProjects.nextAction: v0.4.7 — BACKLIT LEGEND BUTTONS: every tile (selectors + value tiles) now paints as a physical backlit cap — black bezel, domed translucent cap, accent backlight, glowing 'etched' label + value — via shared EB::backlitCap + EB::glowText helpers in CreosoteTheme.h. Glow color = module accent (GRIT coral / AMBER gold / COMPRESS aqua). Value tiles keep a glowing ember level strip; constant backlight (not value-reactive) this pass. Paint-only, uniform grid + sizes UNCHANGED (buttons stay symmetric). DSP untouched. VERIFY the backlit look reads right; then tune glow intensity / whether it should react to value. Remaining structural: GRIT deep controls -> TWEAK, AMBER vertical stage-tags, top-down GR meter, raise bottom section.
